title: PtyStartAgent
description: pty.start_agent — allocate a new PTY and immediately exec an agent CLI (claude, codex, cursor, ...) instead of an interactive shell. The returned pty_id behaves exactly like one from pty.open: all pty.input / pty.resize / pty.close / pty.output / pty.exit primitives work unchanged. This is the minimal hook for Vision Layer 3 agent dispatch inside the ADE.

agent.description: The agent CLI to launch inside the PTY.

args.description: CLI arguments passed to the agent (e.g. ["--dangerously-skip-permissions"]).

cwd.description: Workspace-relative starting directory. Defaults to workspace root.

env.description: Extra environment variables merged onto the workspace baseline (same semantics as pty.open).

pty_id.description: Opaque handle (UUIDv4) for the new PTY session running the agent. Use with all other pty.* calls.
